info.title: AEGIS GRC Platform API
info.description: Enterprise Governance, Risk & Compliance REST API. All endpoints except POST /auth/token require authentication via X-API-Key header or Bearer JWT token.

tags.name: Compliance
tags.description: Compliance packages, standards, objectives and controls

post.description: Exchange valid credentials for a signed JWT bearer token. This endpoint does not require authentication.

get.description: Returns all compliance packages available in the system, such as SOC 2, ISO 27001, PCI-DSS, HIPAA, etc.
Returns full details for a single compliance package, including progress summary and metadata.
Returns all control objectives belonging to a compliance package, optionally filtered by control status.

200.description: List of objectives for the compliance package

data.title: Logical and Physical Access Controls
data.description: The entity implements logical access security measures to protect against threats from sources outside its system boundaries.

get.description: Returns all regulatory and industry standards tracked in the platform.
Returns the risk register, paginated and optionally filtered by severity, status, or owner.

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: Filter by owner user ID or email

data.title: Unpatched critical CVE in production web server
data.description: Apache HTTP Server vulnerable to CVE-2024-38477. Exploitable remotely.

post.description: Adds a new risk entry to the risk register.

example.title: Third-party vendor data breach exposure
example.description: Critical SaaS vendor stores PII without adequate encryption at rest.

example.title: Third-party vendor data breach exposure
example.description: Critical SaaS vendor stores PII without adequate encryption at rest.

get.description: Returns full detail for a single risk entry including treatment history and linked controls.

example.title: Unpatched critical CVE in production web server
example.description: Apache HTTP Server vulnerable to CVE-2024-38477. Exploitable remotely.

get.description: Returns all information security and compliance policies stored in the platform.
Returns all audits including internal assessments and external certifications.

put.description: Updates the compliance status of a specific control objective. Optionally attach a note or link evidence.

example.note: MFA enforced org-wide via Okta. Evidence uploaded.

example.title: Logical and Physical Access Controls
example.note: MFA enforced org-wide via Okta. Evidence uploaded.

get.description: Returns aggregate statistics for the authenticated user's tenant: risk counts by severity, compliance progress, open findings, upcoming audit dates, etc.
Returns all users in the tenant. Requires the `admin` role. Non-admin callers receive 403.

post.description: Accepts a Tenable.io or Tenable.sc vulnerability export payload and creates or updates findings in the AEGIS risk register.
Accepts a Qualys VMDR or WAS findings export and creates or updates findings in the AEGIS risk register.
Accepts a Wiz Issues or Vulnerabilities export payload and creates or updates findings in the AEGIS risk register.

issues.title: Publicly exposed S3 bucket
issues.remediation: Enable bucket Block Public Access settings.

post.description: Accepts a normalized generic findings payload from any vulnerability scanner or security tool. Useful for custom integrations.

findings.title: Weak SSH cipher suites enabled
findings.description: Server accepts deprecated CBC cipher suites over SSH.
findings.remediation: Disable CBC cipher suites in sshd_config.

Forbidden.description: Caller lacks the required role or permission

example.message: You do not have permission to perform this action.
The requested resource does not exist.
Rate limit exceeded. Please slow down.

evidence_ids.description: IDs of pre-uploaded evidence records to attach

mapped_packages.description: Package slugs that map to this standard

source.description: Identifier for the originating tool or script
